description:
'''Malhun'''{{efn|{{langx|ar|الملحون|al-malḥūn}}
{{langx|zgh|ⵍⵎⵍⵃⵓⵏ}}https://www.maroc.ma/amz/culture-du-maroc/patrimoine-immateriel/10}}, meaning 'the melodic poem', is a form of music that originated in [[Morocco]]. It is a kind of urban, sung [[poetry]] written in [[Moroccan Darija]] or sometimes in [[Hebrew language|Hebrew]] that comes from the exclusively masculine working-class milieu of craftsmen's guilds. On 6 December 2023, malhun was added to the [[UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage Lists]] of Morocco.
